Uses of Interface
org.eclipse.collections.api.stack.primitive.MutableCharStack

Packages that use MutableCharStack
Package
Description
org.eclipse.collections.api.factory.stack.primitive
This package contains factory API for creating primitive stack instances.
org.eclipse.collections.api.ordered.primitive
 
org.eclipse.collections.api.stack
This package contains interfaces for stack API.
org.eclipse.collections.api.stack.primitive
This package contains mutable and immutable primitive stack API.
org.eclipse.collections.impl.list.mutable.primitive
This package contains implementations of the mutable primitive list interfaces.
org.eclipse.collections.impl.stack.mutable
This package contains implementations of the MutableStack interface.
org.eclipse.collections.impl.stack.mutable.primitive
This package contains implementations of the mutable primitive stack interfaces.
org.eclipse.collections.impl.string.immutable

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStackFactory.empty()
     
    MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStackFactory.of()
    Same as MutableCharStackFactory.empty().
    MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStackFactory.of(char... items)
    Same as MutableCharStackFactory.with(char[]).
    MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStackFactory.ofAll(Iterable<Character> iterable)
    Same as MutableCharStackFactory.withAll(Iterable).
    MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStackFactory.ofAll(CharIterable items)
    Same as MutableCharStackFactory.withAll(CharIterable).
    MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStackFactory.ofAllReversed(CharIterable items)
    Same as MutableCharStackFactory.withAllReversed(CharIterable).
    MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStackFactory.with()
    Same as MutableCharStackFactory.empty().
    MutableCharStack

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStack.asSynchronized()
     
    MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStack.asUnmodifiable()
     
    default MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStack.newEmpty()
    Creates a new empty mutable version of the same stack type.
    MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStack.reject(CharPredicate predicate)
     
    default MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStack.rejectWithIndex(CharIntPredicate predicate)
    Returns a new MutableCharStack excluding all elements with corresponding indexes matching the specified predicate.
    MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStack.select(CharPredicate predicate)
     
    default MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStack.selectWithIndex(CharIntPredicate predicate)
    Returns a new MutableCharStack including all elements with corresponding indexes matching the specified predicate.
    default MutableCharStack
    MutableCharStack.tap(CharProcedure procedure)

    Classes in org.eclipse.collections.impl.stack.mutable.primitive that implement MutableCharStack
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CharArrayStack
    CharArrayStack is similar to ArrayStack, and is memory-optimized for char primitives.
    class 
    SynchronizedCharStack
    A synchronized view of a MutableCharStack.
    class 
    UnmodifiableCharStack
    This file was automatically generated from template file unmodifiablePrimitiveStack.stg.
